name: Siemens Teamcenter PLM API
what_it_does: Siemens Teamcenter REST and SOA APIs for enterprise product lifecycle management (PLM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage product structure and multi-discipline BOM data retrieval for engineering and manufacturing operations, handle engineering workflow and change management status tracking, access product data management (PDM) including drawings, specifications, and CAD files, retrieve requirements management and traceability data for systems engineering, manage manufacturing process planning and assembly sequence data from MBOM, handle supplier collaboration and classification library data, access product portfolio and program management data for NPD tracking, retrieve compliance and product environmental data for regulatory reporting, manage simulation and test data from NX Nastran and Simcenter integration, and integrate Teamcenter data with SAP ERP, MES, and enterprise systems.
use_cases: Retrieving BOM data from ERP integration agents
Tracking engineering workflow status from development agents
Accessing requirements traceability from systems engineering agents
Monitoring change management from product development agents
not_for: SMB PLM without enterprise Teamcenter deployment complexity
Cloud-only PLM without on-premise SAP and manufacturing system integration
Non-manufacturing industries without complex product structure and lifecycle needs
best_when: A large aerospace, automotive, or industrial manufacturer using Teamcenter wants AI agents to automate BOM retrieval, change management, requirements traceability, manufacturing process data, and SAP ERP integration.
avoid_when: ENGINEERING RISK: Teamcenter controls product release for aerospace and automotive manufacturing — automated change approval or BOM modification without engineering review creates product safety risks. ITAR-controlled design data requires strict access controls. Automated requirements traceability changes can invalidate system-level qualification without appropriate reviews.

auth.notes: Teamcenter uses OAuth 2.0 and session-based authentication. Developer portal at developer.sw.siemens.com. Teamcenter Service Oriented Architecture (SOA) is legacy API; REST API available from Teamcenter 12+. Webhooks for PLM events. Cloud-hosted (Teamcenter X) and on-premise deployment. Munich, Germany HQ (Siemens AG). Teamcenter is PLM division of Siemens Digital Industries Software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual license per user and module; Teamcenter X cloud subscription available
pricing.notes: Munich, Germany. Teamcenter originally EDS Unigraphics, acquired by Siemens (2007). Siemens Digital Industries Software (DISW) division. 100,000+ organizations globally. Teamcenter is most widely used PLM in automotive and industrial manufacturing. NX CAD tightly integrated. Competes with Dassault and PTC for enterprise PLM market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; deployment capacity dependent

known_agent_gotchas: ENGINEERING RISK: Teamcenter BOM release controls production manufacturing; automated change approval without engineering review creates product safety and certification risks
SOA vs. REST API migration — Teamcenter legacy API is SOA (service-oriented architecture with XML); REST API available from TC 12+; verify your deployment version before building REST integrations
On-premise deployment primary — most Teamcenter deployments are on-premise; Teamcenter X cloud is newer and has better REST coverage; verify deployment type
ITAR controlled data — aerospace Teamcenter instances contain ITAR technical data; export control compliance and US person access controls required
SAP integration dependency — Teamcenter-SAP integration (TCMM) is common; understand data flow between Teamcenter and SAP before building parallel integrations
NX CAD integration — Teamcenter tightly integrates with NX CAD; CAD geometry and model data may require NX license for full access beyond metadata
agent_readiness.security_notes: PLM and engineering. SOC2, ITAR, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product BOM, CAD, and requirements data.

security_score_components.security_notes: PLM. SOC2, ITAR, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product lifecycle and engineering data.
